questions: Marvel ar DC er difference ki?
Graphic novel ar comic book ki same?
Comic books ki shudhu bacchader jonno?
answers: Comic books are sequential art publications combining illustrations and text to tell stories. Marvel and DC are the two biggest publishers, known for superheroes like Spider-Man, Batman, Superman, and the X-Men.

Comic books are definitely not just for kids! Titles like Watchmen, Sandman, Maus, and Saga are mature, complex stories. Graphic novels are longer, self-contained comic book stories, often more literary in approach.

Marvel focuses on relatable heroes with real-world problems (Spider-Man, X-Men), while DC features more mythic, godlike characters (Superman, Wonder Woman). Both have incredible stories spanning decades.

To start reading comics, pick a character you like and find a recommended starting point. Trade paperbacks collect story arcs and are easier to follow than individual issues. Digital platforms like Comixology make reading convenient.
